meaning: adj.欺骗的,迷惑的,虚妄的,令人错解的
examples: Our thoughts may be delusive, but they can't be fictitious.
All goodness is delusive, don't be too proud of yourself either.
The delusive contents were commonly self-accusation and self-guilty, hypochondriasis.
The response to the crisis cannot be the withdrawal behind the bulwark and delusive security of separate identities and old and new privileges.
